---
title: ""
pagetitle: "About"
---

![](/assets/photos/IMG_0830.jpg){width="240" .float-start .me-4 .mb-3}

Welcome to my creative graveyard, where ideas and projects come to die. This is my attempt to commit to at least some of them. Each page you see is a win against procrastination.

Whenever I am faced with a big life decision or dilemma, I tend towards formulating it as a mathematical model. The appeal of doing this is not that it gives exact answers to life's problems (nor can it), but that it transforms them into something solvable.

If only every life problem has a closed form solution!
